---
title: "volcano_species"
author: "Ruwen Zhou"
date: "7/26/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
```


#demographic
```{r}
# helios_core = read_excel("data/HELIOS_Core_redacted.xlsx")
# metadata_micro = read_csv("data/metadata_fil_01032024_redacted.csv")
# sample_list = metadata_micro$`Original Sample name`
# helios_new <- filter(helios_core, FREG1_Barcode %in% sample_list)
```
#food nutrition
```{r}
# FFQ_food = read_xlsx("data/HELIOS_FFQA.xlsx")
# FFQ_nutrition = read_xlsx("data/HELIOS_FFQB.xlsx")
# pid_list = helios_new$FREG0_PID
# food_new = filter(FFQ_food, FREG0_PID %in% pid_list)
# nutrition_new = filter(FFQ_nutrition, FREG0_PID %in% pid_list)
```
#species
```{r}
# species = read_csv("data/abundance_bracken_standard_16_20221209_taxa_S_unfiltered_reads_decont2.csv")
# #species$`SAM id`
# helios_new_list = helios_new$FREG1_Barcode
# #sample_list = metadata_micro$`Original Sample name`
# micro_list <- filter(metadata_micro, metadata_micro$`Original Sample name` %in% helios_new_list)
# species_new = filter(species, species$`SAM id` %in% micro_list$`Library ID`)
# species_new
```

```{r}
# new_merge = merge(metadata_micro, species_new, by.x = "Library ID", by.y = "SAM id")
# #new_merge
# species_meta = merge(x = helios_new[,c("FREG1_Barcode", "DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent", "DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours","FBP16_Caffeine")], y = new_merge, by.y = "Original Sample name", by.x = "FREG1_Barcode")
# species_meta = species_meta %>% drop_na(DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent)
# species_meta
```

```{r}
# metadata = species_meta[, c("FREG1_Barcode", "DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent","DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours", "FBP16_Caffeine")]
# metadata
# drop = c("DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent", "Library ID", "SampleType", "seq_batch", "DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours", "FBP16_Caffeine")
# species_data = species_meta[,!(names(species_meta) %in% drop)]
# species_data
```

```{r}
# metadata = metadata[!duplicated(metadata$FREG1_Barcode), ]
# species_data = species_data[!duplicated(species_data$FREG1_Barcode), ]
# species_data
# metadata
```
# import 800 data species
```{r}
species_data_800 = read_excel("data/species_866.xlsx")
ethnicity_800 = read_excel("data/ethnicity_866.xlsx")
species_data_800
ethnicity_800
```



```{r}

drop_rare_species <- function(df, threshold = 0.1) {
  # Calculate the number of samples
  num_samples <- nrow(df)
  
  # Calculate the threshold count
  threshold_count <- num_samples * threshold
  
  # Find columns where the species is present in at least the threshold_count samples
  species_to_keep <- sapply(df, function(col) sum(col > 0) >= threshold_count)
  
  # Subset the dataframe to keep only those species
  df_filtered <- df[, species_to_keep]
  
  return(df_filtered)
}

# Apply the function to your dataframe
species_data_800 <- drop_rare_species(species_data_800)
species_data_800
```

```{r}
# rownames(species_data) = species_data[,1]
# species_data[1] = NULL
# rownames(metadata) = metadata[,1]
# species_data
# metadata
```

```{r}
merged_data <- merge(ethnicity_800[,c("FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")], species_data_800, by.x = "FREG1_Barcode", by.y = "FREG1_Barcode",  all = FALSE)
merged_data = subset(merged_data, FREG5_Ethnic_Group != "O")
merged_data
```

# Volcano plot
```{r}
data_C <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "C", -(1:2)]
data_I <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "I", -(1:2)]
data_M <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "M", -(1:2)]

# Adding a small constant to avoid log2(0) issues
data_C[data_C == 0] <- 1e-6
data_I[data_I == 0] <- 1e-6
data_M[data_M == 0] <- 1e-6

data_IM <- rbind(data_I, data_M)
data_CM <- rbind(data_C, data_M)
data_CI <- rbind(data_C, data_I)

calculate_stats <- function(data1, data2) {
  logFC <- numeric(ncol(data1))
  p_values <- numeric(ncol(data1))
  
  for (i in 1:ncol(data1)) {
    mean1 <- mean(data1[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    mean2 <- mean(data2[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    logFC[i] <- log2(mean2 / mean1)
    
    if (sd(data1[, i], na.rm = TRUE) == 0 || sd(data2[, i], na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
      p_values[i] <- 1
    } else {
      p_values[i] <- t.test(data1[, i], data2[, i])$p.value
    }
  }
  
  # Adjust p-values using the Benjamini-Hochberg method (FDR)
  adj_p_values <- p.adjust(p_values, method = "BH")
  
  results <- data.frame(
    species = colnames(data1),
    logFC = logFC,
    p_value = adj_p_values
  )
  
  results$logP = -log10(results$p_value)
  
  results <- results[results$logP > 0, ]  # Filter out rows with logP = 0
  return(results)
}


# Calculate stats for each pairwise comparison
results_CvsIM <- calculate_stats(data_IM, data_C)
results_IvsCM <- calculate_stats(data_CM, data_I)
results_MvsCI <- calculate_stats(data_CI, data_M)
```


```{r}
results_CvsIM
results_IvsCM
results_MvsCI

library(writexl)

# Create a named list with your dataframes
sheets_list <- list(
  Chinese = results_CvsIM,
  Indian = results_IvsCM,
  Malays = results_MvsCI
)

# Write to Excel with multiple sheets
write_xlsx(sheets_list, "data/Sup2_differential.xlsx")
```


```{r}
# Function to plot volcano plot
plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
}

# Plot the volcano plots
plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Chinese vs Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Indian vs Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Non-Malay vs Malay")

```
```{r}
#write.csv(results_IvsCM, "figure/indian_logfold.csv")

```


```{r}
# Function to plot volcano plot with colored significant points
plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {
  # Define significance thresholds
  sig_threshold <- 0.05
  lfc_threshold <- 1
  
  results$significance <- "Not Significant"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC > lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "red", "Down" = "blue", "Not Significant" = "black")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(sig_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_threshold, lfc_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
}

# Plot the volcano plots with colored significant points
plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Chinese vs Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Indian vs Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Non-Malay vs Malay")

```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)


plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {

  sig_threshold <- 0.03
  lfc_threshold <- 1.2
  
  results$significance <- "Not Significant"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC > lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  

  labeled_results <- results %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant")
  
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(sig_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_threshold, lfc_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    #geom_text(data = labeled_results, aes(label = species), size = 3, box.padding = 0.3)
    geom_text_repel(data = labeled_results, aes(label = species), size = 4.5, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 20)
}

plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Chinese vs Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Non-Indian vs Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Non-Malay vs Malay")

```
```{r}
# For Chinese comparison
sig_CvsIM <- results_CvsIM %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.03 & abs(logFC) > 1.2) %>%
  select(species)

# For Indian comparison
sig_IvsCM <- results_IvsCM %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.03 & abs(logFC) > 1.2) %>%
  select(species)

# For Malay comparison
sig_MvsCI <- results_MvsCI %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.03 & abs(logFC) > 1.2) %>%
  select(species)

sig_CvsIM
sig_IvsCM
sig_MvsCI

```
```{r}
all_unique_species <- unique(c(sig_CvsIM$species, sig_IvsCM$species, sig_MvsCI$species))
all_unique_species
# Save to a single file
#write.csv(data.frame(species = all_unique_species), "figure/unique_significant_species.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
p1 <- plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
ggsave(
  filename = "figure/figure2/volcano_species_strict_C.pdf",
  plot = p1,
  width = 11.67,  # Converting from pixels to inches (1400px/120dpi)
  height = 8.33,  # Converting from pixels to inches (1000px/120dpi)
  device = cairo_pdf
)

# Malay vs Non-Malay volcano plot
p2 <- plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")
ggsave(
  filename = "figure/figure2/volcano_species_strict_M.pdf",
  plot = p2,
  width = 11.67,
  height = 8.33,
  device = cairo_pdf
)

# Indian vs Non-Indian volcano plot
p3 <- plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
ggsave(
  filename = "figure/figure2/volcano_species_strict_I.pdf",
  plot = p3,
  width = 11.67,
  height = 8.33,
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```



```{r}
# png("figure/volcano_species_strict_C.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
# plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
# dev.off()
# png("figure/volcano_species_strict_M.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
# plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")
# dev.off()
# png("figure/volcano_species_strict_I.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
# plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
# dev.off()
```

## change to try lollipop graph
```{r}
library(forcats)

# 1) Lollipop plot (optionally shows CIs if available)
plot_lollipop <- function(results, title,
                          sig_threshold = 0.03, lfc_threshold = 1.2,
                          top_n = 30, label_top = 12,
                          ci_low_col = "ci_lower", ci_high_col = "ci_upper") {

  df <- results
  if (!"logP" %in% names(df)) df$logP <- -log10(df$p_value)

  df$significance <- "Not Significant"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC >  lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  df$significance <- factor(df$significance, levels = c("Up","Down","Not Significant"))

  # keep the most informative rows
  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(species = fct_reorder(species, logFC))

  # label a few strongest signals
  lab_dat <- df_top %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = label_top)

  p <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = logFC, y = species, color = significance)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = logFC, y = species, yend = species),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7)

  # optional horizontal CIs if present
  if (all(c(ci_low_col, ci_high_col) %in% names(df_top))) {
    p <- p + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = .data[[ci_low_col]], xmax = .data[[ci_high_col]]),
                            height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  }

  p +
    geom_point(aes(size = logP), alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(p)", range = c(2, 6)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "right") +
    geom_text_repel(data = lab_dat, aes(label = species),
                    size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 20, box.padding = 0.25)
}

# 2) Compact “forest” (dot–whisker) for only significant species
plot_forest_sig <- function(results, title,
                            sig_threshold = 0.03, lfc_threshold = 1.2,
                            max_rows = 25,
                            ci_low_col = "ci_lower", ci_high_col = "ci_upper") {
  df <- results
  if (!"logP" %in% names(df)) df$logP <- -log10(df$p_value)

  df$significance <- "Not Significant"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC >  lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"

  df_sig <- df %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = max_rows) %>%
    mutate(species = fct_reorder(species, logFC))

  p <- ggplot(df_sig, aes(x = logFC, y = species, color = significance))

  if (all(c(ci_low_col, ci_high_col) %in% names(df_sig))) {
    p <- p + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = .data[[ci_low_col]], xmax = .data[[ci_high_col]]),
                            height = 0.2)
  }

  p +
    geom_point(aes(size = logP)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(p)", range = c(2, 6)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697")) +
    labs(title = paste0(title, " (Significant Only)"), x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "right")
}

# --- Usage with your three contrasts ---
plot_lollipop(results_CvsIM, "Non-Chinese vs Chinese")
plot_lollipop(results_IvsCM, "Non-Indian vs Indian")
plot_lollipop(results_MvsCI, "Non-Malay vs Malay")

# If you have CI columns (ci_lower / ci_upper), the whiskers render automatically:
# plot_forest_sig(results_CvsIM, "Forest: Non-Chinese vs Chinese")

```
```{r}

plot_lollipop <- function(results, title,
                          sig_threshold = 0.03, lfc_threshold = 1.2,
                          top_n = 30, label_top = 12,
                          ci_low_col = "ci_lower", ci_high_col = "ci_upper",
                          wrap_width = 32) {

  # helper (optional) to shorten labels
  abbrev_species <- function(x) {
    x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
    x <- gsub("^(s__|g__)", "", x)
    sub("^([A-Za-z])[A-Za-z]+\\s+(.+)$", "\\1. \\2", x)
  }

  df <- results
  if (!"logP" %in% names(df)) df$logP <- -log10(df$p_value)

  df$significance <- "Not Significant"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC >  lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  df$significance <- factor(df$significance, levels = c("Up","Down","Not Significant"))

  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(species = fct_reorder(species, logFC))

  # choose which to label
  lab_dat <- df_top %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = label_top) %>%
    mutate(label = abbrev_species(species))

  # <<< NEW: split into Up (right) and Down (left)
  lab_up   <- lab_dat %>% filter(significance == "Up")
  lab_down <- lab_dat %>% filter(significance == "Down")

  # for nudging & extra room on both sides
  x_rng  <- range(df_top$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_span <- diff(x_rng); if (!is.finite(x_span) || x_span == 0) x_span <- 1

  p <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = logFC, y = species, color = significance)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = logFC, y = species, yend = species),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7)

  if (all(c(ci_low_col, ci_high_col) %in% names(df_top))) {
    p <- p + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = .data[[ci_low_col]], xmax = .data[[ci_high_col]]),
                            height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  }

  p +
    geom_point(aes(size = logP), alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(p)", range = c(2, 6)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    #scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = NULL) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(gsub("_", " ", x), width = wrap_width)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "right",
          plot.margin = margin(5, 30, 5, 30)) +   # <<< CHANGED: room on both sides
    # <<< NEW: RIGHT-side labels for Up
    geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_up,
      aes(label = label),
      direction = "x",
      hjust = 0,                          # right side = left-justified
      nudge_x = 0.06 * x_span,            # push right
      box.padding = 0.25,
      point.padding = 0.15,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      size = 3.5,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    # <<< NEW: LEFT-side labels for Down
    geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_down,
      aes(label = label),
      direction = "x",
      hjust = 1,                          # left side = right-justified
      nudge_x = -0.06 * x_span,           # push left
      box.padding = 0.25,
      point.padding = 0.15,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      size = 3.5,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.30, 0.30)))  # <<< CHANGED: space left+right
}

```
 Bifidobacterium subtile
```{r}
results_MvsCI
results_CvsIM %>% 
  filter(species == "Bifidobacterium catenulatum")
```

```{r}
plot_lollipop(results_CvsIM, "Non-Chinese vs Chinese")
plot_lollipop(results_IvsCM, "Non-Indian vs Indian")
plot_lollipop(results_MvsCI, "Non-Malay vs Malay")
```

```{r}
plot_lollipop3 <- function(results, title,
                          sig_threshold = 0.03, lfc_threshold = 1.2,
                          top_n = 30, label_top = 12,
                          ci_low_col = "ci_lower", ci_high_col = "ci_upper",
                          wrap_width = 32) {
  
  # Helper function to shorten labels
  abbrev_species <- function(x) {
    x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
    x <- gsub("^(s__|g__)", "", x)
    sub("^([A-Za-z])[A-Za-z]+\\s+(.+)$", "\\1. \\2", x)
  }
  
  df <- results
  if (!"logP" %in% names(df)) df$logP <- -log10(df$p_value)
  
  df$significance <- "Not Significant"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC >  lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  df$significance <- factor(df$significance, levels = c("Up","Down","Not Significant"))
  
  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(species = fct_reorder(species, logFC))
  
  # Choose which to label - prioritize by significance AND fold change magnitude
  lab_dat <- df_top %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant") %>%
    arrange(p_value, desc(abs(logFC))) %>%  # Sort by p-value, then by effect size
    slice_head(n = label_top) %>%
    mutate(label = abbrev_species(species))
  
  # Split into Up (right) and Down (left)
  lab_up   <- lab_dat %>% filter(significance == "Up")
  lab_down <- lab_dat %>% filter(significance == "Down")
  
  # Calculate ranges for positioning
  x_rng  <- range(df_top$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_span <- diff(x_rng); if (!is.finite(x_span) || x_span == 0) x_span <- 1
  
  p <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = logFC, y = species, color = significance)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = logFC, y = species, yend = species),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7)
  
  # Add confidence intervals if available
  if (all(c(ci_low_col, ci_high_col) %in% names(df_top))) {
    p <- p + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = .data[[ci_low_col]], xmax = .data[[ci_high_col]]),
                            height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(aes(size = logP), alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(p)", range = c(2, 6)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = NULL) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(gsub("_", " ", x), width = wrap_width)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "right",
          plot.margin = margin(5, 50, 5, 50))  # More room on sides
  
  # IMPROVED: Better label positioning with more spacing parameters
  if (nrow(lab_up) > 0) {
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_up,
      aes(label = label),
      direction = "y",              # Allow vertical movement
      hjust = 0,                    # Left-justified for right side
      nudge_x = 0.08 * x_span,      # Push further right
      box.padding = 0.4,            # More padding around boxes
      point.padding = 0.3,          # More padding from points
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      size = 3.2,
      segment.size = 0.2,
      segment.alpha = 0.6,
      xlim = c(max(df_top$logFC, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.05 * x_span, NA),  # Restrict to right side
      force = 2,                    # Increase repulsion force
      max.iter = 5000              # More iterations for better placement
    )
  }
  
  if (nrow(lab_down) > 0) {
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_down,
      aes(label = label),
      direction = "y",              # Allow vertical movement
      hjust = 1,                    # Right-justified for left side
      nudge_x = -0.08 * x_span,     # Push further left
      box.padding = 0.4,            # More padding around boxes
      point.padding = 0.3,          # More padding from points
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      size = 3.2,
      segment.size = 0.2,
      segment.alpha = 0.6,
      xlim = c(NA, min(df_top$logFC, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.05 * x_span),  # Restrict to left side
      force = 2,                    # Increase repulsion force
      max.iter = 5000              # More iterations for better placement
    )
  }
  
  p + 
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.35, 0.35)))  # Even more space on sides
}

# ALTERNATIVE VERSION: Selective labeling with tiered approach
plot_lollipop_selective <- function(results, title,
                                  sig_threshold = 0.03, lfc_threshold = 1.2,
                                  top_n = 30, label_top = 8,  # Reduced default
                                  ci_low_col = "ci_lower", ci_high_col = "ci_upper",
                                  wrap_width = 32) {
  
  abbrev_species <- function(x) {
    x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
    x <- gsub("^(s__|g__)", "", x)
    # More aggressive abbreviation for tight spaces
    result <- sub("^([A-Za-z])[A-Za-z]+\\s+(.+)$", "\\1. \\2", x)
    # Further shorten if still too long
    if (nchar(result) > 25) {
      result <- substr(result, 1, 22)
      result <- paste0(result, "...")
    }
    return(result)
  }
  
  df <- results
  if (!"logP" %in% names(df)) df$logP <- -log10(df$p_value)
  
  df$significance <- "Not Significant"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC >  lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  df$significance[df$p_value < sig_threshold & df$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  df$significance <- factor(df$significance, levels = c("Up","Down","Not Significant"))
  
  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(p_value) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(species = fct_reorder(species, logFC))
  
  # STRATEGY: Only label the most significant points, balanced between Up/Down
  sig_species <- df_top %>% filter(significance != "Not Significant")
  
  # Take equal numbers from Up and Down, prioritizing by p-value
  up_species <- sig_species %>% 
    filter(significance == "Up") %>% 
    arrange(p_value) %>% 
    slice_head(n = ceiling(label_top/2))
  
  down_species <- sig_species %>% 
    filter(significance == "Down") %>% 
    arrange(p_value) %>% 
    slice_head(n = floor(label_top/2))
  
  lab_dat <- bind_rows(up_species, down_species) %>%
    mutate(label = abbrev_species(species))
  
  # Calculate ranges
  x_rng  <- range(df_top$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_span <- diff(x_rng); if (!is.finite(x_span) || x_span == 0) x_span <- 1
  
  p <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = logFC, y = species, color = significance)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = logFC, y = species, yend = species),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7)
  
  if (all(c(ci_low_col, ci_high_col) %in% names(df_top))) {
    p <- p + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = .data[[ci_low_col]], xmax = .data[[ci_high_col]]),
                            height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(aes(size = logP), alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(p)", range = c(2, 6)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = NULL) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(gsub("_", " ", x), width = wrap_width)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "right",
          plot.margin = margin(5, 60, 5, 60))
  
  # Single geom_text_repel with better algorithm
  if (nrow(lab_dat) > 0) {
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_dat,
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3.0,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      point.padding = 0.4,
      min.segment.length = 0.1,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      segment.size = 0.2,
      segment.alpha = 0.7,
      force = 3,
      max.iter = 10000,
      seed = 42  # For reproducible label placement
    )
  }
  
  p + 
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.4, 0.4)))
}
```


```{r}
# ggsave("figure/lollopop_C.pdf", 
#        plot = plot_lollipop(results_CvsIM, "Non-Chinese vs Chinese", sig_threshold = 0.05, lfc_threshold = 1, label_top = 20),
#        width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("figure/lollopop_I.pdf", 
#        plot = plot_lollipop(results_IvsCM, "Non-Indian vs Indian", sig_threshold = 0.05, lfc_threshold = 1, label_top = 20),
#        width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("figure/lollopop_M.pdf", 
#        plot = plot_lollipop(results_MvsCI, "Non-Malay vs Malay", sig_threshold = 0.05, lfc_threshold = 1, label_top = 20),
#        width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```



## BOX PLOT
```{r}
plot_bifido_genus_CIM_raw_stars <- function(merged_data,
                                            groups = c("C","I","M"),
                                            show_exact_p = FALSE,
                                            y_bracket_quantile = 0.98,
                                            save_pdf = NULL) {
  library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(ggpubr); library(scales)
  df <- merged_data %>%
    filter(FREG5_Ethnic_Group %in% groups) %>%
    mutate(Ethnicity = factor(FREG5_Ethnic_Group, levels = groups))
  all_bifido <- grep("(?i)Bifidobacterium", names(df), value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  genus_cols <- grep("(?i)^(?:g__)?Bifidobacterium$", names(df), value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  species_cols <- setdiff(all_bifido, genus_cols)
  if (length(all_bifido) == 0) stop("No columns containing 'Bifidobacterium' found.")
  bifido_raw <- if (length(genus_cols) >= 1) df[[genus_cols[1]]]
                else rowSums(df[, species_cols, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  dat <- df %>% transmute(Ethnicity, Bifido = bifido_raw)
  # axis top and bracket positions
  bracket_base <- quantile(dat$Bifido, probs = y_bracket_quantile, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(bracket_base) || bracket_base <= 0) bracket_base <- max(dat$Bifido, na.rm = TRUE)
  axis_top <- ceiling((bracket_base * 1.25) / 1e6) * 1e6
  # pairwise comparisons
  comps <- list(c("C","I"), c("C","M"))
  y_pos <- axis_top * seq(0.80, 0.80 + 0.08*(length(comps)-1), by = 0.08)
  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = Ethnicity, y = Bifido, fill = Ethnicity)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(C = "#9FDDCA", I = "#9EA3F1", M = "#E17887")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(C = "#9FDDCA", I = "#9EA3F1", M = "#E17887")) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = comps, method = "t.test", label = "p.signif", 
                       symnum.args = list(cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1), 
                                        symbols = c("***", "**", "*", ""))) +
    labs(title = "HELIOS Cohort Bifidobacterium Abundance Across Ethnic Groups",
         y = "Bifidobacterium Abundance",
         x = "Ethnicity")
  # Console stats
  print(kruskal.test(Bifido ~ Ethnicity, data = dat))
  print(pairwise.wilcox.test(dat$Bifido, dat$Ethnicity, p.adjust.method = "BH"))
  if (!is.null(save_pdf)) ggsave(save_pdf, p, width = 5.5, height = 4.2, dpi = 300)
  p
}
```
```{r}
p1 <- plot_bifido_genus_CIM_raw_stars(merged_data, show_exact_p = FALSE)
p1
```
## try some different figures
```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Filter for 3 groups and create Ethnicity factor
df <- merged_data %>%
  filter(FREG5_Ethnic_Group %in% c("C", "I", "M")) %>%
  mutate(Ethnicity = factor(FREG5_Ethnic_Group,
                            levels = c("C", "I", "M")))

# 1. detect all columns containing "Bifidobacterium"
all_bifido <- grep("(?i)Bifidobacterium", names(df), value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)

# 2. detect genus-level columns: exactly "Bifidobacterium" or "g__Bifidobacterium"
genus_cols <- grep("(?i)^(g__)?Bifidobacterium$", names(df), value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)

# 3. species-level columns = anything containing bifido but not genus column
species_cols <- setdiff(all_bifido, genus_cols)

# 4. Compute Bifido abundance
bifido_raw <- if (length(genus_cols) >= 1) {
  df[[genus_cols[1]]]
} else {
  rowSums(df[, species_cols, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# 5. Final dataframe for plotting
dat <- df %>% dplyr::select(Ethnicity) %>% mutate(Bifido = bifido_raw)

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggdist)
library(gghalves)
bifido_raw
# dat: Ethnicity + Bifido (from your previous code)
dat <- df %>% transmute(Ethnicity, Bifido = bifido_raw)

eth_colors <- c("C" = "#9FDDCA", "I" = "#9EA3F1", "M" = "#E17887")

p_rain <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = Ethnicity, y = Bifido, fill = Ethnicity)) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(adjust = 0.6, width = 0.7, .width = 0.95,
                       justification = -0.2, alpha = 0.8, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.7, position = position_nudge(x = 0.15)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Ethnicity),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.05),
             size = 1.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = eth_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = eth_colors) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) 
  # labs(title = "Bifidobacterium Abundance Across Ethnic Groups",
  #      y = "Abundance", x = "Ethnicity")

p_rain
ggsave("figure/genus_bifido.pdf",  plot = p_rain, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
library(ggridges)

p_ridge <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = Bifido, y = Ethnicity, fill = Ethnicity)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.85, scale = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = eth_colors) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Bifidobacterium Abundance by Ethnicity",
    x = "Bifidobacterium Abundance",
    y = ""
  )

p_ridge


```
```{r}
library(Rmisc)

sum_df <- summarySE(dat, measurevar = "Bifido", groupvars = "Ethnicity")

p_bar <- ggplot(sum_df, aes(x = Ethnicity, y = Bifido, fill = Ethnicity)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Bifido - se, ymax = Bifido + se),
                width = 0.2, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = eth_colors) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Bifidobacterium Abundance with SEM",
    y = "Mean Abundance"
  )

p_bar

```
# heatmaps species level
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. Keep only C/I/M and define Ethnicity
df <- merged_data %>%
  filter(FREG5_Ethnic_Group %in% c("C","I","M")) %>%
  mutate(
    Ethnicity = factor(FREG5_Ethnic_Group, levels = c("C","I","M"))
  )

# 2. All columns that start with "Bifidobacterium"
bifido_cols <- names(df)[grepl("^Bifidobacterium\\b", names(df))]

# optional: check them
print(bifido_cols)

# 3. Is there a pure genus column named exactly "Bifidobacterium"?
genus_col <- bifido_cols[bifido_cols == "Bifidobacterium"]

# 4. Species columns = all the others that start with "Bifidobacterium"
species_cols <- setdiff(bifido_cols, genus_col)
species_cols <- species_cols[!grepl("sp\\. (SKU|TKU|FKU)", species_cols)]

# safety: if you *only* have species (no pure genus), this will just be all bifido_cols
print(species_cols)


```
```{r}
library(tidyr)

species_means <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(Ethnicity, dplyr::all_of(species_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = dplyr::all_of(species_cols),
    names_to = "Species",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Ethnicity, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_abundance = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence     = mean(Abundance > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  mutate(
    z_abundance = scale(mean_abundance)[,1]   # standardize across ethnicities
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
top_species <- species_means %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(mean_abundance)) %>%
  slice_max(total, n = 22) %>%
  pull(Species)


species_means_plot <- species_means %>%
  filter(Species %in% top_species)


```
```{r}
p_circle_heatmap <- ggplot(species_means_plot,
                           aes(x = Ethnicity, y = Species)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = mean_abundance, fill = z_abundance),
    shape = 21, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 12), name = "Mean abundance") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B",
    midpoint = 0, name = "Z-score"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic")
  ) +
  labs(
    #title = "Bifidobacterium species across ethnic groups",
    x = "Ethnicity",
    y = "Species"
  )

p_circle_heatmap

ggsave("figure/species_bifido.pdf",  plot = p_circle_heatmap, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```
